summary: Frontend-only iteration 5 testing: i18n (EN/HI/TE) wiring & persistence + Leaflet marker clustering on /map. All requested checks passed. localStorage 'publicos.lang' persists across reload. Hindi & Telugu translations render across Landing, Footer, and MapView. Custom cluster bubbles (.civic-cluster-bubble) render with counts ['2','3','6','2','2','3','5'] and navy color for small clusters — matches design spec.

issues: Category panel labels still in English (Roads & Potholes, Garbage Collection, Water Supply & Leakage, Street Lights, Drainage Overflow, Illegal Construction) — not part of this iteration's scope but worth translating for completeness in a future pass.

action_items: Optional: translate category names in /map category panel to HI/TE for consistency (not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: i18n.js: clean implementation with English fallback path. Good.
Header.jsx: language dropdown uses Radix portal; data-testids are properly applied to both trigger and items.
MapView clustering: custom iconCreateFunction reads cluster count and applies threshold-based color via inline CSS var --c. Bubble rendering verified visually.
401 console errors observed (6x) for /api/auth/me when no user is logged in — typical for anonymous landing/map; consider suppressing or treating as expected by AuthContext to keep console clean.
test_credentials: Not used — anonymous flows only (auth-gated regressions not retested as iteration explicitly skipped them; previous iteration_4 covered them).
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n + clustering verified end-to-end on preview URL https://civictrack-3.preview.emergentagent.com. localStorage key is 'publicos.lang'. Cluster CSS classes: .civic-cluster (wrapper, via L.divIcon) and .civic-cluster-bubble (visible bubble). When testing /map clustering: at default zoom on India bounds, expect 6-8 cluster bubbles. Use selector .civic-cluster-bubble to count and read text. Hindi map title: 'भारत, लाइव.'; Telugu hero line 1: 'ప్రతి గుంట.'; Hindi copyright: '© 2026 PublicOS पोर्टल — एक स्वतंत्र नागरिक-तकनीकी पहल'. The 6 console 401s come from /api/auth/me probes when unauthenticated — pre-existing behavior, not introduced by this iteration.
